results.english_text: For he cast two pillars of brass, of eighteen cubits high apiece: and a line of twelve cubits did compass either of them about.

anomalies.notes: High Gematria Sum: 6068 exceeds threshold of 5987.11 (Mean: 3383.25, SD: 1735.91)

results.english_text: And he made two chapiters of molten brass, to set upon the tops of the pillars: the height of the one chapiter was five cubits, and the height of the other chapiter was five cubits:

anomalies.notes: High Gematria Sum: 10632 exceeds threshold of 5987.11 (Mean: 3383.25, SD: 1735.91)

results.english_text: And nets of checker work, and wreaths of chain work, for the chapiters which were upon the top of the pillars; seven for the one chapiter, and seven for the other chapiter.

anomalies.notes: High Gematria Sum: 9388 exceeds threshold of 5987.11 (Mean: 3383.25, SD: 1735.91)

results.english_text: And he made the pillars, and two rows round about upon the one network, to cover the chapiters that were upon the top, with pomegranates: and so did he for the other chapiter.

anomalies.notes: High Gematria Sum: 8168 exceeds threshold of 5987.11 (Mean: 3383.25, SD: 1735.91)

results.english_text: And the chapiters that were upon the top of the pillars were of lily work in the porch, four cubits.
And the chapiters upon the two pillars had pomegranates also above, over against the belly which was by the network: and the pomegranates were two hundred in rows round about upon the other chapiter.

anomalies.notes: High Gematria Sum: 6736 exceeds threshold of 5987.11 (Mean: 3383.25, SD: 1735.91)

results.english_text: And he set up the pillars in the porch of the temple: and he set up the right pillar, and called the name thereof Jachin: and he set up the left pillar, and called the name thereof Boaz.
Also he made before the house two pillars of thirty and five cubits high, and the chapiter that was on the top of each of them was five cubits.
And he made chains, as in the oracle, and put them on the heads of the pillars; and made an hundred pomegranates, and put them on the chains.
And he reared up the pillars before the temple, one on the right hand, and the other on the left; and called the name of that on the right hand Jachin, and the name of that on the left Boaz.
